## Type

- [ ] `feat` new capability
- [ ] `fix` bug fix
- [ ] `docs` documentation/readme
- [ ] `test` tests or evaluation
- [ ] `chore` repo/tooling

## Validation

- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] `python -m py_compile src/recallguard/server.py scripts/run_local_server.py`
- [ ] Local UI checked at `http://127.0.0.1:8765` when UI changed
- [ ] Screenshots or notes attached when UI changed

## Foundry / Governance Impact

- [ ] No Foundry workflow impact
- [ ] Knowledge Agent / File Search impact
- [ ] Task Agent / Code Interpreter impact
- [ ] Guardrails, traces, Entra ID, or HITL impact
- [ ] Final submission asset impact
